cause: Low-order integration is unstable for the closed-loop vehicle dynamics.
trigger: Run the baseline lap with Euler integration.
effect: Early collision or large trajectory divergence.
mitigation: Use RK4 and keep timestep convergence gates in CI.

cause: Controller chases local waypoint geometry and creates high steering activity.
trigger: Pure pursuit lookahead is too small.
mitigation: Use the sweep-selected baseline lookahead and steering-effort gates.

cause: Controller cuts corners and under-reacts to curvature.
trigger: Pure pursuit lookahead is too large.
effect: Corner cutting, large CTE, or missed lap completion.
mitigation: Bound lookahead by map curvature and validate max CTE.

cause: Control action arrives after the vehicle has moved to a different path state.
trigger: Hold controller commands behind a 100 ms delay.
mitigation: Timestamp commands, reduce delay, and add delay compensation.

trigger: Force steering command to the actuator limit.
effect: Path tracking degrades and saturation masks controller intent.
detection_signal: command steer dwell at limit 0.419 rad
mitigation: Monitor steering limit dwell time and lower speed when saturated.

trigger: Inject high measurement noise into estimator inputs.
effect: Estimator position RMSE increases and confidence degrades.
mitigation: Tune measurement covariance from sensor specs and reject outliers.

cause: Estimator runs open loop through a long measurement outage.
trigger: Remove measurements for a 3 s window.
effect: State uncertainty and position error grow during dropout.
mitigation: Detect stale measurements and slow or stop until updates recover.
